children.text: investigating an application for a guarantee;
appraising property offered as security for a guarantee;
providing services related to an escrow fund under or a deposit fund under ;section 53715 of this titlesection 53716 of this title
inspecting property during construction, reconstruction, or reconditioning; and

monitoring and providing services related to the obligor’s compliance with any terms related to the obligations, the guarantee, or maintenance of the Secretary or Administrator’s security interests under this chapter.

children.heading: .—Total Fee Limitation
children.label: b .—Total Fee Limitation
children.text: The total fees under subsection (a) may not exceed 0.5 percent of the original principal amount of the obligations to be guaranteed.

children.label: A
children.text: be credited as an offsetting collection to the account that finances the administration of the loan guarantee program;

children.label: B
children.text: be available for expenditure only to pay the costs of activities and services for which the fee is imposed; and

children.heading: .—Fee limitation inapplicable
children.label: 2 .—Fee limitation inapplicable
children.text: Fees collected under this subsection are not subject to the limitation of subsection (b).
